name: DeferredQuestionsTab

states.name: Tab Registration & Navigation
states.description: The Decisions tab appears in the RunDetailContent tab bar and is accessible via the ?tab=decisions URL parameter.
states.precondition: Decisions tab is selected and component is still loading

states.name: Empty State — No Deferred Questions

requiredElements.textContains: No deferred questions for this run

states.description: When a workflow run has no deferred questions (either because blocking_approval was true, or confidence was always high enough to auto-approve silently), an empty state is displayed.
states.precondition: No deferred questions exist for this run

states.name: Header — Stats Badges & Bulk Actions
states.description: When questions exist, a header shows the title, status count badges, and a bulk approve button.
states.precondition: At least one deferred question exists

states.name: Question Card — Data Display
states.description: Each deferred question is rendered as a bordered card showing iteration number, risk level badge, confidence percentage, and the question text.
states.precondition: At least one deferred question exists

states.name: Question Card — Approve & Reject Actions
states.description: Pending questions show Approve and Reject buttons. Approved/rejected questions show a status badge instead.

states.name: Question Card — Expanded Details
states.description: Clicking the chevron expands a question card to show auto-decision details, summary, files modified, review comment, git checkpoint, and timestamps.
states.precondition: At least one deferred question exists

states.name: Question Grouping — Status Sections
states.description: Questions are displayed in three sections: Pending Review (with MessageSquareWarning icon), Rejected (with XCircle icon), and Approved (with CheckCircle2 icon). Each section only renders when it has questions.
states.precondition: At least one pending question exists

states.name: Visual Design & Styling
states.description: Design tokens, colors, and typography for the deferred questions UI.
states.precondition: At least one deferred question exists

states.name: Floating Panel — Active Dashboard
states.description: During active workflow execution, a floating panel appears in the bottom-right corner showing pending deferred questions. Only visible when pending questions exist and not dismissed.
states.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow with pending deferred questions

states.name: Floating Panel — Real-Time Events & Toasts
states.description: The floating panel subscribes to WebSocket events for live updates and shows toast notifications when new questions arrive.
states.precondition: Active dashboard is showing a running workflow

states.name: Active Runs Bar — Pending Decisions Badge
states.description: The CompactRunCard in the ActiveRunsBar shows an amber badge with the count of pending deferred questions, fetched via useEventTriggeredFetch.
states.precondition: Multiple active runs exist, at least one has pending deferred questions

states.name: Data Flow — Dual Source & Sync
states.description: The Decisions tab fetches data from the runner (live) with fallback to the backend (synced). This ensures deferred questions are viewable even when the runner is offline.
states.precondition: Runner is connected and tab is active

description: Deferred Questions (Decisions tab) — displays non-blocking human-in-the-loop questions that were deferred during autonomous workflow execution. Users can review the AI's auto-decisions, approve them, or reject them (triggering targeted rework). Also covers the floating panel on the Active Dashboard and the badge counter on active run cards.
